items.author: LiLi
items.title: Defective item
items.content: came looking just fine, turns out it didn’t wanna charge and is broken internally so it’s useless. I wasn’t even able to use it and i feel like it charges well but i can’t tell because it came DEFECTIVE.

items.author: Leethal
items.title: Nice job making this one.
items.content: Slim east to use and on the go!!

items.author: Night Owl
items.title: Works Well, It's a Buy!
items.content: Great phone charging bank, better than my old anker of the same variety, an upgrade. Cord built in, digital charge read out, and great capacity.

items.author: S.G.
items.title: Cord stopped working after just only days.
items.content: Have always been a huge proponent of Anker products ever since I had a battery bank years ago that I had to replace because it got lost. Unfortunately, this product was not what I thought it would be. Works well and charges fast, however, within days the built in USB-C cable stopped working. The battery bank still works fine, but now I need to carry around a cord, which defeats the purpose of why I bought this in the first place.

items.author: ERIC
items.title: Device was confiscated on a domestic fight within China
items.content: I am writing to provide feedback regarding the product. While I am happy with the quality of the device, I encountered a significant issue during travel. The product was confiscated on a domestic flight within China. It appears the device does not comply with local policies for air travel because it lacks the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) marking. I wanted to bring this to your attention so you are aware of these requirements for customers traveling in that region.
